title: erigeron × pseudocrispus
intro: Erigeron × pseudocrispus, also known as Fruited Fleabane, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of North America and has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. Erigeron × pseudocrispus can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues.
